scripts.tauri:build: mkdir -p ~/.cache/tauri && cp scripts/linuxdeploy-plugin-gtk.sh ~/.cache/tauri/linuxdeploy-plugin-gtk.sh && chmod +x ~/.cache/tauri/linuxdeploy-plugin-gtk.sh && tauri build --config backend/tauri.conf.json
scripts.icons: tauri icon backend/app-icon.png -o backend/icons && cp backend/icons/128x128@2x.png frontend/public/assets/appicon.png && cp backend/icons/32x32.png frontend/public/assets/favicon.png
